## Summary

Describe the change.

## Scope

- [ ] Core validation
- [ ] Agent Kit package/spec
- [ ] CLI
- [ ] Exporters/adapters
- [ ] Prepared Prompts
- [ ] Context Builder
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run smoke` passes
- [ ] Security considerations reviewed
- [ ] Docs updated if needed
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or private files included
- [ ] Agent Kit schema changes documented if applicable

## Security Notes

Call out any path handling, filesystem cleanup, package import/export, prompt rendering, or script-handling implications.
